case_title: FETZER, CLAUDIA VS ALLIANT INTERNATIONAL UNIVERSITY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY FETZER, CLAUDIA AS TO DEFENDANT ALLIANT INTERNATIONAL UNIVERSITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO ALLIANT INT'L TREESE WILSON AGT FOR SERVICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF OCT-01-2008

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FETZER, CLAUDIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLIANT INTERNATIONAL UNIVERSITY $551.97 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $636.97, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2201.88 AND ATTRIBUTES 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFENDNT ALLIANT INTERNATIONAL UNIVERSITY; 25% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF; & 50% FAULT TO THE UNNAMED PARTY WHO LEFT THE SUBJECT BACKPACK ON THE FLOOR OF DEFENDANT'S FACILIY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
